reviews.comment:
Óptimo servicio. Los socios del ACA deberían tener prioridad. Hay una guardia permanente del auxilio del ACA.
Y no se debe poner nafta premium a un gasóleo!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. ACA members should have priority. There's a permanent ACA emergency service on call.
And you shouldn't put premium gasoline in diesel!!!
